name: standards-conformance report emits a no-active-standards marker when no standards are active
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro && printf 'sources: []\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/active-standards.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/conformance-report.sh" --active .claude-tdd-pro/active-standards.yaml --out STANDARDS-CONFORMANCE.md --now 2026-05-13T00:00:00Z 2>err.txt && grep -q 'no_active_standards: true' STANDARDS-CONFORMANCE.md && echo ok 1>&2
